CONTENT.Career: While playing for Voždovac in the 2016–17 Serbian SuperLiga, Popović was named in the competition's Team of the Season.On 12 February 2018, Popović was transferred to Norwegian club Bodø/Glimt.On 26 June 2018, Popović signed two-year deal with Red Star Belgrade.
CONTENT.Honours: Serbian SuperLiga Team of the Season: 2016–17Red Star BelgradeSerbian SuperLiga: 2018–19, 2019–20, 2020–21, 2021–22, 2023–24Serbian Cup: 2020–21, 2021–22, 2023–24
CONTENT.External links: Zoran Popović at SoccerwayZoran Popović at WorldFootball.net

SUMMARY: Zoran Popović (Serbian Cyrillic: Зоран Поповић; born 28 May 1988) is a Serbian professional footballer who plays as a goalkeeper for Železničar Pančevo.
